scene.imageSummary: Roger stands with crossbow raised on the left side of the empty square. Lukas stands far across the plaza at the linden tree on the right, a bright red apple balanced on his head. The vast cobblestone expanse between them emphasizes the impossible distance and tension of the moment. Silent crowd lines the square edges, watching.

setting.description: Medieval town square with grey cobblestones, ancient linden tree anchoring the right side, multi-storey timber-frame houses bordering the plaza. The Gessler pole with hat stands in the distance center. Townspeople line the edges of the square in tense silence, standing back from the open space.
setting.lighting: Cloudy midday light, flat and grey
setting.camera: Ultra-wide establishing shot emphasizing the distance
setting.depthLayers: Roger left foreground holding crossbow, vast empty cobblestone plaza spans center, Lukas tiny figure right background under linden tree with apple on head

characters.name: Roger
characters.action: Raising crossbow, aiming across the square

characters.name: Lukas
characters.position: far background right (tiny figure, 1/6 the size of Roger)
characters.action: Standing still under linden tree, holding still with apple on head

objects.name: Marktplatz Altdorf
objects.position: entire composition, grey cobblestones, linden tree right side, timber-frame houses

objects.name: Roter Apfel
objects.position: on Lukas's head in far background

objects.name: Rogers Armbrust
objects.position: in Roger's hands, raised and aimed

scene.translatedSummary: Roger steht mit erhobener Armbrust auf der linken Seite des leeren Platzes. Lukas steht weit entfernt unter der Linde auf der rechten Seite, ein leuchtend roter Apfel auf seinem Kopf. Die riesige Weite des Kopfsteinpflasters zwischen ihnen unterstreicht die unmoegliche Distanz und die Spannung des Augenblicks. Die stumme Menge saeumt die Plaetzränder und beobachtet.
